youtube.title: ⚡ 3 Claude slash commands that cut coding time 70%
youtube.description:
Claude Code can write your commit messages in 5 seconds instead of 5 minutes.

Most developers using Claude don't know about slash commands. These three will change how you work:

/compact clears your context mid-session without losing memory. No more restarting conversations when you hit the token limit. Claude summarizes everything and keeps going.

/review runs automated code reviews on your entire branch. It checks security, quality, and correctness before you ship. If you push to production, this one matters.

/commit generates actually good commit messages. Not the generic "fixed bug" stuff — real, specific descriptions of what changed and why.

These aren't nice-to-have features. They're how you stop doing work the AI should handle. The time savings compound fast when you're making dozens of commits a day.

Comment SLASH and I'll send you the full command list.
